global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with various graphical elements and text promoting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting new content and inviting users to try the service for free.

elements.label: orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: circular graphic
elements.description: A large circular graphic in the center, featuring a smooth, rounded shape.

elements.label: oval graphic
elements.description: An oval graphic positioned slightly below the circular graphic, with a soft outline.

elements.label: three small circles
elements.description: Three small circles arranged horizontally, each with a light outline.

elements.label: vertical rectangle
elements.description: A vertical rectangle graphic on the left side, featuring a smooth edge.

elements.label: large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangle graphic on the right side, extending vertically.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle graphic at the bottom center, with a subtle outline.

elements.label: PulsePlay UGC
elements.description: Bold, uppercase text reading 'PulsePlay UGC' at the top of the ad.

elements.label: new season drops
elements.description: Text stating 'A new season drops' in a prominent, readable font.

elements.label: new hits every week
elements.description: Text stating 'New hits every week' in a smaller font below the main message.

elements.label: Try for free
elements.description: A bold call-to-action button at the bottom center, inviting users to 'Try for free'.

elements.label: decorative shape
elements.description: A decorative shape in the center, adding visual interest to the layout.

elements.label: small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the bottom, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: The main headline text prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: secondary message
elements.description: A secondary message text at the bottom, providing additional context.
elements.text_content: new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action text at the bottom, encouraging user engagement.
